---
name: Incident / Outage Postmortem
about: Document an incident, root cause, and follow-up actions
title: "[Incident]: "
labels: incident, needs-triage
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe what happened and the user impact.

## Timeline

| Time (UTC) | Event |
|------------|-------|
|            |       |
|            |       |

## Detection

How was the incident detected and by whom?

## Root Cause

Explain the underlying issue(s).

## Resolution

Describe the steps taken to mitigate and fully resolve the incident.

## Impact Assessment

Quantify affected users, duration, and severity.

## What Went Well

Highlight effective responses or safeguards.

## What Went Wrong

Note gaps in process, tooling, or communication.

## Action Items

| Priority | Owner | Task | Due Date |
|----------|-------|------|----------|
|          |       |      |          |
|          |       |      |          |

## Preventative Measures

List longer-term initiatives or follow-up investigations.

## Additional Context

Link to logs, dashboards, chat transcripts, or other artifacts.
